title: BarkinMad Studios Website Relaunch
content: The BarkinMad Studios website has undergone a major relaunch, bringing a cleaner design, improved navigation, expanded content, and a stronger foundation for future growth.

What started as a simple studio website has evolved into a central hub for games, apps, development updates, company news, and software development services. The goal of the relaunch was to make it easier for visitors to discover projects, follow development progress, and learn more about the work being carried out by BarkinMad Studios.

The updated website now provides dedicated sections for the growing ZX Series of retro-inspired arcade games, The Game Of Darts, and future projects currently under development. Visitors can quickly explore games, read development articles, and stay informed about new releases and updates.

One of the biggest additions is the expanded News & Devlog section. This allows regular development updates to be published directly to the website, providing a behind-the-scenes look at game development, software projects, technical challenges, and future plans.

The relaunch also introduces a new Services section that highlights the software development work offered by BarkinMad Studios. This includes mobile application development, custom software solutions, business tools, prototypes, proof-of-concepts, and website content platforms.

Behind the scenes, the website has been rebuilt to improve performance, maintainability, and scalability. Content is now managed through structured data, making updates easier while ensuring consistency across the entire site.
Additional improvements include enhanced search engine optimisation, expanded information pages, updated privacy and security resources, and a stronger platform for future content growth.
The website relaunch represents another important milestone for BarkinMad Studios as the studio continues to grow its portfolio of games, apps, and software projects.
Thank you to everyone who has visited the website, followed development updates, downloaded an app, or supported BarkinMad Studios during its first year. There is much more still to come.
